com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model

Interface LuckyBlock


  • public interface LuckyBlock
    Represents a Lucky Block, which can be placed in the world and interacted with by players. It contains information about the block's item representation, icon, recipes, shop setup, animation setup, and custom name.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addRecipes(ILuckyRecipe... recipes)
      Adds the given recipes to the Lucky Block.
      AnimationSetup getAnimationSetup()
      Gets the animation setup for the Lucky Block, which defines the animations to play when the block is interacted with.
      java.lang.String getCustomName()
      Gets the custom name of the Lucky Block, which can be displayed to players when they interact with the block.
      ItemStack getIcon()
      Gets the icon representation of the Lucky Block.
      Identifier getIdentifier()
      Gets the unique identifier associated with this Lucky Block.
      ItemStack getItem()
      Gets the item representation of the Lucky Block.
      default ItemStack getItem(int amount)
      Gets the item representation of the Lucky Block with the specified amount.
      ItemsBag getItemsBag()
      Gets the ItemsBag associated with the Lucky Block, which contains the possible drops and their probabilities.
      LuckyBlockKey getKey()
      Gets the unique key associated with this Lucky Block.
      java.util.List<ILuckyRecipe> getRecipes()
      Gets the list of recipes associated with the Lucky Block.
      ShopSetup getShopSetup()
      Gets the shop setup for the Lucky Block, which defines the items and prices for the in-game shop.
      default void giveItem(Player player)
      Gives the item representation of the Lucky Block to the specified player with a default amount of 1.
      void giveItem(Player player, int amount)
      Gives the item representation of the Lucky Block to the specified player with the specified amount.
      void placeBlock(Block block)
      Places the Lucky Block in the world at the specified block location.
      boolean playOpen(Plugin instance, Block block, Player target, boolean dropItems, boolean ignoreCancel)
      Plays the opening animation and effects for the Lucky Block when a player interacts with it.
      void removeRecipes(java.util.function.Predicate<ILuckyRecipe> predicate)
      Removes recipes from the Lucky Block that match the given predicate.
      void setAnimationSetup(AnimationSetup animationSetup)
      Sets the animation setup for the Lucky Block.
      void setCustomName(java.lang.String customName)
      Sets the custom name for the Lucky Block.
      void setIcon(ItemStack itemStack)
      Sets the icon representation of the Lucky Block.
      void setItem(ItemStack itemStack)
      Sets the item representation of the Lucky Block.
      default void setItemAndIcon(ItemStack itemStack)
      Sets both the item and icon representations of the Lucky Block to the same ItemStack.
      void setItemsBag(ItemsBag bag)
      Sets the ItemsBag for the Lucky Block, which contains the possible drops and their probabilities.
      void setShopSetup(ShopSetup shopSetup)
      Sets the shop setup for the Lucky Block.

    • Method Detail

      • setItem

        void setItem(ItemStack itemStack)
        Sets the item representation of the Lucky Block.
        Parameters:
        itemStack - The ItemStack to set as the item representation.

      • setIcon

        void setIcon(ItemStack itemStack)
        Sets the icon representation of the Lucky Block.
        Parameters:
        itemStack - The ItemStack to set as the icon representation.

      • setItemAndIcon

        default void setItemAndIcon(ItemStack itemStack)
        Sets both the item and icon representations of the Lucky Block to the same ItemStack.
        Parameters:
        itemStack - The ItemStack to set as both the item and icon representation.

      • removeRecipes

        void removeRecipes(java.util.function.Predicate<ILuckyRecipe> predicate)
        Removes recipes from the Lucky Block that match the given predicate.
        Parameters:
        predicate - The predicate to determine which recipes to remove.

      • addRecipes

        void addRecipes(ILuckyRecipe... recipes)
        Adds the given recipes to the Lucky Block.
        Parameters:
        recipes - The recipes to add.

      • setShopSetup

        void setShopSetup(ShopSetup shopSetup)
        Sets the shop setup for the Lucky Block.
        Parameters:
        shopSetup - The ShopSetup to set for the Lucky Block.

      • setAnimationSetup

        void setAnimationSetup(AnimationSetup animationSetup)
        Sets the animation setup for the Lucky Block.
        Parameters:
        animationSetup - The AnimationSetup to set for the Lucky Block.

      • setCustomName

        void setCustomName(java.lang.String customName)
        Sets the custom name for the Lucky Block.
        Parameters:
        customName - The custom name to set for the Lucky Block.

      • getKey

        LuckyBlockKey getKey()
        Gets the unique key associated with this Lucky Block.
        Returns:
        The LuckyBlockKey representing the unique key of this Lucky Block.

      • getIdentifier

        Identifier getIdentifier()
        Gets the unique identifier associated with this Lucky Block.
        Returns:
        The Identifier representing the unique identifier of this Lucky Block.

      • giveItem

        default void giveItem(Player player)
        Gives the item representation of the Lucky Block to the specified player with a default amount of 1.
        Parameters:
        player - The player to give the item to.

      • giveItem

        void giveItem(Player player,
              int amount)
        Gives the item representation of the Lucky Block to the specified player with the specified amount.
        Parameters:
        player - The player to give the item to.
        amount - The amount of the item to give.

      • getItem

        ItemStack getItem()
        Gets the item representation of the Lucky Block.
        Returns:
        The ItemStack representing the item representation of the Lucky Block.

      • getItem

        default ItemStack getItem(int amount)
        Gets the item representation of the Lucky Block with the specified amount.
        Parameters:
        amount - The amount to set for the item representation.
        Returns:
        The ItemStack representing the item representation of the Lucky Block with the specified amount.

      • getIcon

        ItemStack getIcon()
        Gets the icon representation of the Lucky Block.
        Returns:
        The ItemStack representing the icon representation of the Lucky Block.

      • getRecipes

        java.util.List<ILuckyRecipe> getRecipes()
        Gets the list of recipes associated with the Lucky Block.
        Returns:
        A List of ILuckyRecipe representing the recipes associated with the Lucky Block.

      • getItemsBag

        ItemsBag getItemsBag()
        Gets the ItemsBag associated with the Lucky Block, which contains the possible drops and their probabilities.
        Returns:
        The ItemsBag representing the possible drops and their probabilities for the Lucky Block.

      • setItemsBag

        void setItemsBag(ItemsBag bag)
        Sets the ItemsBag for the Lucky Block, which contains the possible drops and their probabilities.
        Parameters:
        bag - The ItemsBag to set for the Lucky Block.

      • getShopSetup

        ShopSetup getShopSetup()
        Gets the shop setup for the Lucky Block, which defines the items and prices for the in-game shop.
        Returns:
        The ShopSetup representing the shop setup for the Lucky Block.

      • getAnimationSetup

        AnimationSetup getAnimationSetup()
        Gets the animation setup for the Lucky Block, which defines the animations to play when the block is interacted with.
        Returns:
        The AnimationSetup representing the animation setup for the Lucky Block.

      • placeBlock

        void placeBlock(Block block)
        Places the Lucky Block in the world at the specified block location.
        Parameters:
        block - The Block representing the location where the Lucky Block should be placed.

      • getCustomName

        java.lang.String getCustomName()
        Gets the custom name of the Lucky Block, which can be displayed to players when they interact with the block.
        Returns:
        The custom name of the Lucky Block.

      • playOpen

        boolean playOpen(Plugin instance,
                 Block block,
                 Player target,
                 boolean dropItems,
                 boolean ignoreCancel)
        Plays the opening animation and effects for the Lucky Block when a player interacts with it.

        Actually open the LuckyBlock using player and a block as source

        Parameters:
        instance - The Plugin instance to use for scheduling tasks and managing resources.
        block - The Block representing the location of the Lucky Block being opened.
        target - The Player who is interacting with the Lucky Block.
        dropItems - Whether to drop the items contained in the Lucky Block when it is opened.
        ignoreCancel - Whether to ignore any cancellation of the opening event (e.g., by other plugins).
        Returns:
        true if the opening animation and effects were successfully played, false otherwise.
